name: Crepes a La Neige (Crepes with Snow)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a bowl to form a smooth dough.
2. Spoon a small amount of batter into a pan with about 1 inch of hot fat.
3. Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown and crispy.
4. Serve with molasses or grated maple sugar.
